roles.name: Creative Director
roles.description: The visionary at the top of the room — sketches the campaign architecture and protects the big idea.

roles.name: Account Supervisor
roles.description: Wrangles the client, the timeline, and the team — keeps the trains running between the office and Madison Avenue.

roles.name: Office Manager
roles.description: Holds the keys to every desk drawer, file cabinet, and switchboard line — the operational backbone.

roles.name: Senior Copywriter
roles.description: Crafts the headlines and body copy — builds the campaign one Apex line and one tagline at a time.

roles.name: Partner — New York
roles.description: Name on the door. Sets the standard for the firm and signs the biggest pitches.

roles.name: Senior Art Director
roles.description: The trained hand on the layout pad — leads visual execution from storyboard to final mech.

roles.name: Junior Art Director
roles.description: Mounts the boards, paints the comps, and learns the craft under the senior's eye.

roles.name: Media Director
roles.description: Architect of the buys — wires together print, radio, and television placements into one machine.

roles.name: Media Planner
roles.description: Lays out the schedule, negotiates rates, builds the connective tissue between agency and outlets.

roles.name: Junior Media Buyer
roles.description: Books the spots, cuts the orders, learns the back-channels of the media trade.

roles.name: Traffic Manager
roles.description: Inspects every piece of work in and out of production — catches the typo before it hits the printer.

roles.name: Head of Account Services
roles.description: Senior steward of every client relationship — leads the agency's go-to-market story.

roles.name: Account Executive
roles.description: Day-to-day owner of the client — shepherds campaigns, status reports, and three-martini lunches.

roles.name: Junior Account Executive
roles.description: Shadows the AE, takes notes at every meeting, runs the deck back to the office.

roles.name: Strategic Planner
roles.description: Sits in the conference room and translates what the client said into what the client meant.

roles.name: Head Copywriter
roles.description: Senior wordsmith — owns the brand voice and mentors the junior copy bench.

roles.name: Junior Copywriter
roles.description: Pitches taglines into the wastebasket until one survives the Creative Director's pencil.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set. Realms map to the four agency eras across the show's run.

realms.projectName: Sterling Cooper — Lucky Strike Brand Refresh
Sterling Cooper Draper Pryce — Heinz Beans Launch
Sterling Cooper & Partners — Chevy Vega Integration
McCann Erickson — Coca-Cola Global Brand Engagement

sterling-cooper.name: Lucky Strike Briefing
sterling-cooper.description: Discovery sign-off — Bert and Roger green-light the brand refresh.

sterling-cooper.name: It's Toasted Concept Lock
sterling-cooper.description: Build kickoff: Don's tagline survives the first round of cuts.

sterling-cooper.name: Carousel Pitch Rehearsal
sterling-cooper.description: Mid-project gate: dry-run in the conference room.

sterling-cooper.name: Print Buy Confirmed
sterling-cooper.description: Phase invoice trigger: spreads booked in Life and Look magazines.

sterling-cooper.name: Campaign Goes to Print
sterling-cooper.description: Go-Live: Lucky Strike refresh hits newsstands.

sterling-cooper.name: Hand-off to Account Services
sterling-cooper.description: Hyper-care close: account stewardship passed to Ken Cosgrove.

sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.name: Pierre Hotel Founding
sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.description: Project kickoff: the new agency opens for business in a hotel suite.

sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.name: Heinz Tagline Workshop
sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.description: Build phase: Peggy and Stan land on the beans concept.

sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.name: Client Tasting Approval
sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.description: UAT gate: Heinz tastes the work and signs off.

sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.name: Television Spot Airs
sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.description: Go-Live: the Heinz spot runs in primetime.

sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.name: Lane's Financial Reckoning
sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.description: Final invoice: the books are closed for the launch.

sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.name: Awards Submission
sterling-cooper-draper-pryce.description: Hyper-care close: campaign entered for the Clios.

sterling-cooper-partners.name: Merger Announcement
sterling-cooper-partners.description: Discovery: SCDP and CGC formally combine — new letterhead ordered.

sterling-cooper-partners.name: Detroit Concept Sprint
sterling-cooper-partners.description: Build: Don and Ted lock the Vega creative direction.

sterling-cooper-partners.name: Partners' Strategic Review
sterling-cooper-partners.description: Solution review with Jim Cutler and the partners.

sterling-cooper-partners.name: Chevy Vega Pitch Day
sterling-cooper-partners.description: Go-Live: the campaign pitched to GM in Detroit.

sterling-cooper-partners.name: IPO Filing
sterling-cooper-partners.description: Project close: agency files to go public.

sterling-cooper-partners.name: Final Phase Invoice
sterling-cooper-partners.description: Final billing: the Vega engagement closed out.

mccann-erickson-final.name: Hobart Welcome Briefing
mccann-erickson-final.description: Kickoff: Jim Hobart welcomes the SC&P talent into McCann.

mccann-erickson-final.name: Hilltop Concept Reveal
mccann-erickson-final.description: Discovery: Don sketches an idea about teaching the world to sing.

mccann-erickson-final.name: Jingle Composed & Recorded
mccann-erickson-final.description: Build: lyric and music finalized for the Coke spot.

mccann-erickson-final.name: Coca-Cola Final Approval
mccann-erickson-final.description: UAT acceptance: Atlanta signs off on the storyboards.

mccann-erickson-final.name: Hilltop Spot Premiere
mccann-erickson-final.description: Go-Live: the new spot debuts on national television.

mccann-erickson-final.name: Final Engagement Invoice
mccann-erickson-final.description: Final invoice: McCann closes the engagement books.

Don Draper.notes: Unplanned trip to California — visiting Anna.

Roger Sterling.notes: Recovery after the second heart attack — doctor's orders.

Joan Holloway.notes: Maternity leave — short window between Greg's deployments.

Peggy Olson.notes: Personal time — undisclosed, do not page.

Pete Campbell.notes: House hunting in Cos Cob with Trudy.

Lane Pryce.notes: Trip back to London — family business.

Bert Cooper.notes: Out — shoes off in the office, do not disturb.

Megan Calvet.notes: Acting class workshop — auditions in the city.

Bob Benson.notes: Off-site with a Chevy executive — networking.

Lou Avery.notes: Tokyo trip — pitching Scout's Honor to Hanna-Barbera.
